---
title: "The Rev. Ernest Wollaston Silver"
---

## The Rev. Ernest Wollaston Silver

**Dates:** (1862-1935)

### Description

diocesan examiner in religious education

### Biography

<i>Hampshire Advertiser</i> (10 July 1895), 4.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, Jan 26th [1899]](../letters/3393_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Febry 8th 1897

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
